heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 30115 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Commission for the purpose of carrying out its functions under this Act, and under chapters 95 and 96 of title 26, not to exceed $5,000,000 for the fiscal year ending . There are authorized to be appropriated to the Commission $6,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , $1,500,000 for the period beginning , and ending , $6,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , $7,811,500 for the fiscal year ending , and $9,400,000 (of which not more than $400,000 are authorized to be appropriated for the national clearinghouse function described in section 30111(a)(10) of this title) for the fiscal year ending .June 30, 1975June 30, 1976July 1, 1976September 30, 1976September 30, 1977September 30, 1978September 30, 19811See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, means the Federal Election Campaign Act of 1971, as defined by .section 30101 of this title, referred to in text, was repealed by , , .Section 30111(a)(10) of this titlePub. L. 107–252, title VIII, § 801(b)(3)116 Stat. 1726Oct. 29, 2002
CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Congress, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 439c of Title 2

Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 310, and is classified to .section 314 of Pub. L. 92–225section 30110 of this titleAnother prior was renumbered section 309, and is classified to .section 314 of Pub. L. 92–225section 30109 of this title
